content:
From 00000e359321a8020cfd3a752b6525cb02d05b82 Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
From: randymcmillan <randy.lee.mcmillan@gmail.com>
Date: Fri, 15 Sep 2023 16:48:04 -0400
Subject: [PATCH] 2097/711687/807868/03/0001cfd7/gnostr.org/1694810881

---
 patch.demo.sh | 2 +-
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/patch.demo.sh b/patch.demo.sh
index 8a848e5..feadce0 100755
--- a/patch.demo.sh
+++ b/patch.demo.sh
@@ -38,7 +38,7 @@ for td in .gnostr/ ; do
         for f in $PATCHES; do
 
             git apply --allow-empty  <(cat $f)
-            gnostr-legit . -p 00000 -m "$(echo date +%s)" | gnostr-relays
+            gnostr-legit . -p 00000 -m "$(pwd | grep -o "[^/]*$")/$(date +%s)" | gnostr-relays
 
         done
     done
--
libgit2 1.6.4
